expectations.evidence: Provides full .claude/settings.json config with all four hooks: SessionStart, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionEnd
Uses 'npx agent-heart hook claude-code --event pre-tool-use' and similar for all events
Provides '/loop 3m check agent-heart status for stale or dead runs' plus three more targeted variants
Prerequisites section with npm install, agent-heart init, agent-heart server start
SessionStart locks claude-code/session, SessionEnd unlocks it, PreToolUse includes session heartbeat
